message:
feat(agent): plumb repair policy mode through extension session initialization

Add RepairPolicyMode resolution from config/CLI into the JS runtime
configuration, connecting the policy-level repair intent to the actual
runtime behavior:

- AgentSession gains runtime_repair_mode_from_policy_mode() const fn
  mapping RepairPolicyMode variants (Off, Suggest, AutoSafe, AutoStrict)
  to the corresponding RepairMode used by the JS runtime
- enable_extensions_with_policy() now accepts an optional RepairPolicyMode
  parameter and applies the resolved repair mode to PiJsRuntimeConfig
- src/main.rs resolves repair policy via config method
  resolve_repair_policy_with_metadata(), defaults to AutoStrict for
  extension-heavy workloads when user has not explicitly set a policy
- Resolution is logged with a structured tracing event including the
  source (explicit config vs default) and the resolved mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
